features.description: CRUD for EquipoEdt (EDT associations per parte diario)
steps: GET /api/equipment/associations/edt?parte_diario_id=X — verify lists EDT associations for a parte diario
Verify seed data loads (10,457 rows total)
POST /api/equipment/associations/edt with {parte_diario_id, edt_id, porcentaje: 60, actividad: 'Excavacion'} — verify 201
POST another EDT with porcentaje: 40 — verify 201
GET /api/equipment/associations/edt/{id} — verify detail
PUT /api/equipment/associations/edt/{id} with {porcentaje: 50} — verify 200
DELETE /api/equipment/associations/edt/{id} — verify 204

features.description: EquipoEdt porcentaje validation: must sum to 100% per parte_diario
steps: Create EDT 1 with porcentaje: 60
Create EDT 2 with porcentaje: 30
GET /api/equipment/associations/edt/validate/{parte_diario_id} — verify returns {valid: false, total: 90}
Create EDT 3 with porcentaje: 10
GET validate — verify {valid: true, total: 100}
Try creating EDT 4 with porcentaje that would exceed 100 — verify appropriate warning/error

features.description: CRUD for EquipoCombustible (fuel consumption per valorizacion)
steps: GET /api/equipment/associations/combustible?valorizacion_legacy_id=X — verify lists fuel records
Verify seed data loads (4,451 rows total)
POST /api/equipment/associations/combustible with {fecha, cantidad: 50, precio_unitario_sin_igv: 12.50} — verify 201
Verify importe auto-calculated: 50 * 12.50 = 625.00
GET /api/equipment/associations/combustible/{id} — verify detail with calculated importe
PUT /api/equipment/associations/combustible/{id} with {cantidad: 60} — verify importe recalculates to 750.00
DELETE /api/equipment/associations/combustible/{id} — verify 204

features.description: EquipoCombustible auto-calculates importe from cantidad * precio_unitario
steps: Create record with cantidad: 100, precio_unitario_sin_igv: 15.00
GET record — verify importe = 1500.00
Update cantidad to 120 — verify importe recalculates to 1800.00
Update precio_unitario_sin_igv to 16.00 — verify importe recalculates to 1920.00

features.description: EquipoEdt panel embedded in parte diario detail page
steps: Navigate to an existing parte diario detail page
Verify EDT panel appears as a section/card within the detail
Verify grid shows: porcentaje, EDT nombre, actividad
Verify percentage bar/indicator showing total percentage
Click 'Agregar EDT' — verify form appears with EDT picker and porcentaje input
Add EDT — verify appears in grid and percentage updates
Remove EDT — verify grid and percentage update

features.description: EquipoCombustible panel embedded in valorizacion detail page
steps: Navigate to an existing valorizacion detail page
Verify fuel consumption panel appears as a section/card
Verify aero-data-grid shows: numero_vale, fecha, cantidad, precio_unitario, importe
Click 'Agregar Combustible' — verify inline form
Add record — verify importe auto-calculates in the form
Verify total sum displays at bottom of grid

features.description: Existing parte diario detail page still works after EquipoEdt integration
steps: Navigate to /equipment/operaciones/partes-diarios/{id}
Verify existing sections still render correctly
Verify no console errors
Verify EDT panel loads data correctly
Verify page performance is acceptable (no excessive API calls)

features.description: Existing valorizacion detail page still works after EquipoCombustible integration
steps: Navigate to an existing valorizacion detail page
Verify existing sections still render correctly
Verify no console errors
Verify combustible panel loads data correctly

features.description: Backend tests for equipo EDT and combustible pass
steps: Run: npm run test:backend
Verify test_equipo_edt.py passes all tests including porcentaje validation
Verify no regressions in existing test_reportes.py and test_valorizaciones.py
